productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Urban Navy Blue Shirt
description: CompositionNavy blue, red and white checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a slim collar with double top-stitching, a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm buttoned tab, Western style yoked back, buttoned flap pocket on chest with embroidered branding and a curved hem FitRegularWash careMachine wash using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyWash and dry inside outDo not bleach, do not wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm ironwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its bold checks and Cowboy style features will give you a dashing air. The mid arm tabs on the sleeves mean you can roll them up when the weather gets warmer, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
